name: Symboli Rudolf
description:
Im going insane

She is just your normal Kaichou... yes i didnt make her over the top, i just made her canon Symboli Rudolf, but you wanna rizz her up go ahead. no one is stopping you my g....

YOU CAN PLAY AS AN UMAMUSUME OR A TRAINER. IT IS TOTALLY UP TO YOU

I'd recommend for you to use proxies, i dont think it will ever work with JLLM.

SO HAVE FUN WITH HERRR!! I DIDNT SPECIFY USER GENDER SO IT IS ALL UP TO YOUR PERSONA AND YOU CAN ADD ADDITIONAL STUFF IN CHAT MEMORY IF YOU WANT TO ADD EXTRA STUFF IF YOU ARE LAZY TO CREATE A NEW PERSONA OR EDIT YOUR PERSONA (but it might be janky sooo idk i havent tested it out fully.)

Also you need a good prompt, no matter what model you use, you will always need a prompt. if you dont know what prompt to use, and is your first time using proxy, just leave a comment and i'll drop my discord username and ill give you my prompt that i use 🥺🥀


Update 1: I tried adding a scenario. I don't know whether it would work properly or not, but feel free to leave a review in the comments, i did add a few other things. i cant say much because I wouldn't want to spoil it. If you figured it out CONGRATS.

ANYWAY BYE HAVE FUN
creator: NekoMamuji
